summary: Decisions In Progress sub-tab with Vietnamese lifecycle badges, session-backed status, resume at inputs step, and outcome links after executable workflow completion.

interfaceChanges.description: In Progress sub-tab listing approved decisions with lifecycle status.

mappings.criterion: After approving a decision on Recommended, it appears under In Progress with correct initial status
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue197_decisions_in_progress.test.tsx::shows approved npl as executing after approve on Recommended

mappings.criterion: needs_input resume opens detail flow at inputs step
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue197_decisions_in_progress.test.tsx::opens decision detail flow at inputs step from resume link

mappings.criterion: Completed executable workflow shows completed status after modal success
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue197_decisions_in_progress.test.tsx::shows completed status after leakage workflow modal success

mappings.criterion: Test approve In Progress list contains decision with expected status
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue197_decisions_in_progress.test.tsx::shows noop workflow as needs_input after approve on Recommended
